rows: Flash the program to the NESSY board and occur the error like below chart: ![](_images/ECT Bug_Dependence Track/NvM_EndlessLoop.png) I found that you write the wiki about the error but not have the solve solution. [Software Flashing] Platform - XC-CT China Convergence - Docupedia (bosch.com) Please update the wiki about how to solve the read flash error and upload relevant file. Closed by Newton, This error is happened in MCAL 1.40, for the new version MCAL 2.10 we do not have this issue any more. We need to have initial DataFlash Generation script which is used to generate the initial value of NvM Block. 21 Oct 2022 Check internally to finish this topic. Need to be done before next Friday .

With new cold added, the ram section " RegionBlock_0_DSPR_Core0 " is always not enough. Each time we need to change the .ld file. ![](_images/ECT Bug_Dependence Track/2022-09-13_14h19_45.png) 21 Oct 2022 Give analysis result before next Friday . Currently find that the memory in not correct.

The total size of the CPU0 Data Scratch-Pad SRAM (CPU0 DSPR) is "240 KB" and the address range is from "7000 0000 to 7003 BFFF" In the current implementation DSPR core 0 region uses only 201 KB and remaining were used by DrvFlash-8 KB, BootShared-1 KB, ResetSaved-31 KB The size of the DSPR core 0 region is increased to 240 KB by ignoring the DrvFlash and BootShared regions and the Address range and size of the ResetSaved region is changed Region                                                            Address range      Length                 Size RegionBlock_0_DSPR_Core0                     7000 0000             0x0003BFFF       240 KB RegionBlock_DSPR_Core0_ResetSaved   7003 C000            0x00003FFF        16 KB Permanent Solution: Issue will be fixed once we have Multicore is enabled. (LD Files changes)
